table_trans: Government Decision No. & Date of Creation of अ.पदन No. APO-0816 / Pr. र.103/प Vol-3, D 28/05/2018
Last given Government Decision and Date

According to the Department, Government Decision D. 25.02.2022, the posts of Police Naiks have been declared as dead cadre. Accordingly, 460 posts of Police Naiks in No. 8 have been adjusted to the cadre of Assistant Sub-Inspector of Police, Police Constables and Police Constables. At present, 77 Police Naiks are working at the Commissioner of Police, Pimpri Chinchwad establishment.
